closed_residuals.title: preset list requires daemon running for embedded presets
closed_residuals.closure_note: Embedded presets now resolved from compile-time data via build.rs; preset list works without daemon

closed_residuals.title: No YAML depth/size limits on user-supplied preset YAML
closed_residuals.closure_note: YAML depth (10) and size (1MB) limits enforced with clear error messages

closed_residuals.title: init rejects _ prefix but scan silently skips — inconsistent UX
closed_residuals.closure_note: init accepts _ prefix; list warns on _-prefixed entries; preset validate subcommand added

closed_residuals.title: Preset lookup scans all user presets O(n) instead of O(1)
closed_residuals.closure_note: HashMap index built at scan time with mtime-based cache invalidation; O(1) lookup
